title: MGN 675 (M+F) Amendment 1 The merchant shipping (control and management of ships' ballast water and sediments) Regulations 2022.
body: "Notice to all owners, Ship Operators and Managers, Charterers, Masters and Officers of Merchant Ships, Skippers of Fishing Vessels, Shipbuilders, Port Authorities, Operators of Fixed and Floating Platforms and Drilling Rigs and Classification Societies.  This notice should be read with the Merchant Shipping (Control and Management of Ships’ Ballast Water and Sediments) Regulations 2022 and MSN 1908. "
